D3DBACKBUFFER_TYPE

The D3DBACKBUFFER_TYPE value is used to specify the type of back buffer.

typedef DWORD D3DBACKBUFFER_TYPE;

Constants

D3DBACKBUFFER_TYPE_MONO
Specifies a non-stereo swap chain.

Requirements

  Header: Declared in d3d8types.h.

See Also

IDirect3DDevice8::GetBackBuffer
